text: Healthy living involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins, provides the energy your body needs. Regular exercise, even a daily 30-minute walk, strengthens your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep—around seven to nine hours each night—to help your body recover and your mind rest. Mental health matters too. Take time to relax, connect with loved ones, and manage stress. Finally, work-life balance helps you avoid burnout. Schedule breaks and hobbies you enjoy. By caring for your body and mind, you can feel healthier and happier every day.
